description: Style NoteGet some serious street cred with this jacket from scullers. The soft and warm thermal filling gives lightweight comfort, while the mock neck and quilted design gives it a serious urban edge. Team this with long-sleeved tees, low slung jeans and sports shoes for a casual look with an aggressive edge.Product DetailsSleeveless olive jacket with a zippered placket concealed by a flap that has velcro closure, toggle straps at the neck, has a concealed zippered pocket at the back of the neck to store away the hood, two pockets in the front near the chest, two pockets near the waist with velcro closures, mesh lining at the back and one zippered pocket and one velcro pocket on the insideMaterial and Care70% cotton 30% nylonUse mild detergentTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not beachWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
